mapper.sql: id, passage_id, part_group_id, question_number, question_type, answer_mode, question_text, correct_answer, options_json, accepted_answers_json, group_label, case_insensitive, ignore_whitespace, ignore_punctuation, display_order, score, is_deleted
mapper.insert: insert into reading_question ( passage_id, part_group_id, question_number, question_type, answer_mode, question_text, correct_answer, options_json, accepted_answers_json, group_label, case_insensitive, ignore_whitespace, ignore_punctuation, display_order, score, is_deleted ) values ( #{passageId}, #{partGroupId}, #{questionNumber}, #{questionType}, #{answerMode}, #{questionText}, #{correctAnswer}, #{optionsJson}, #{acceptedAnswersJson}, #{groupLabel}, #{caseInsensitive}, #{ignoreWhitespace}, #{ignorePunctuation}, #{displayOrder}, #{score}, 0 )
mapper.select: select from reading_question where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select from reading_question where id = #{id} limit 1
select from reading_question where passage_id = #{passageId} and is_deleted = 0 order by display_order asc, question_number asc, id asc
select from reading_question where passage_id = #{passageId} order by display_order asc, question_number asc, id asc
mapper.update: update reading_question set part_group_id = #{partGroupId}, question_number = #{questionNumber}, question_type = #{questionType}, answer_mode = #{answerMode}, question_text = #{questionText}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, options_json = #{optionsJson}, accepted_answers_json = #{acceptedAnswersJson}, group_label = #{groupLabel}, case_insensitive = #{caseInsensitive}, ignore_whitespace = #{ignoreWhitespace}, ignore_punctuation = #{ignorePunctuation}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, score = #{score} where id = #{id}
update reading_question set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update reading_question set is_deleted = 1 where passage_id = #{passageId} and is_deleted = 0
update reading_question set is_deleted = 0 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
update reading_question set is_deleted = 0 where passage_id = #{passageId} and is_deleted = 1
